invocation: /deep-research impact of EU AI Act on open-source model providers in 2026
mechanical_checks: research-plan.md is presented and NO mcp__tavily__* call appears in the transcript before explicit user approval
exactly four artifacts exist in the invocation CWD after Phase 6: research-plan.md, research-report.md, research-sources.json, research-evidence.json
python3 scripts/verify_gates.py check-artifacts --sources research-sources.json --evidence research-evidence.json --length standard exits 0
every [^n] footnote in research-report.md resolves to a research-sources.json record
the final chat message quotes the verify_gates.py JSON verdict

invocation: /deep-research --length short --lang en impact of EU AI Act on open-source model providers in 2026
mechanical_checks: cited source count >= 15 (short floor) or the Methodology note documents the shortfall after exactly one expansion round
no claim with admiralty_credibility >= 4 appears outside the Needs Verification section (check via tests/check-example-invariants.sh research-sources.json research-evidence.json)
no source with domain_tier 4 appears in any supporting_source_ids array

invocation: /deep-research --length exhaustive state of multi-agent orchestration frameworks 2026 (on a deliberately narrow topic trending under 100 sources)
mechanical_checks: at most ONE expansion round fires after Phase 3 (transcript shows one allowlist broadening + 2-4 added sub-questions, never a second round)
the run proceeds to Phase 4 after the single round and the Methodology note documents the residual shortfall
total CRAG iterations across the run <= 6
runtime warning emitted if the run exceeds the 15-minute exhaustive budget

invocation: /deep-research --model fable --length exhaustive <hard long-horizon topic> (session running on opus)
mechanical_checks: research-plan.md declares the observed session model, the requested fable tier, and recommends /model fable before approval — the run never silently proceeds as if the tier applied
NO Anthropic SDK/API call appears anywhere in the transcript (D-4: Claude-Code-native, zero keys)
any Agent (subagent) call in the transcript that grades Phase-2 candidates or judges entailment carries an explicit model override, and the entailment judge model differs from the synthesis model
for a security/bio-domain topic, the plan notes the Fable 5 refusal-classifier risk and recommends the opus tier
